1.text: Increased density in the upper lobe and superior segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Paracicatricial bronchiectatic changes in the upper lobe and superior segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Structural distortion and volume loss in the upper lobe and superior segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

4.text: Increased density in the upper lobe and lower lobe of the right lung

5.text: Paracicatricial bronchiectasis in the upper lobe and lower lobe of the right lung

6.text: Band-like areas of increased density consistent with scarring in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

7.text: Areas of mosaic attenuation in both lungs
